text.title: Ai Pairing Decision Tree Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Ai Pairing Decision Tree output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: ≥1; pre-declared conditions that revert mode to HUMAN-ONLY
≤500 chars; cites at least one axis score
1-3 sentences describing the actual change scope

forbidden.pattern: mode=AGENT-DRIVES on schema migrations or auth code
axis_scores summing to 0 (no zero-cost change exists in practice)
rationale that does not reference any specific axis

allowed-transformations.transformation: Round fractional axis scores UP to the next integer.
If reversibility OR regulatory is 3, force mode = HUMAN-ONLY regardless of sum.

list.item: Every required field populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
